allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['data'][:1] if d.get\('data'\) else d, indent=2\)[:800]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); k=d.get\('data',{}\); print\('keys:', sorted\(k.keys\(\)\)\); print\('socialLinks:', k.get\('socialLinks'\)\); print\('reg#:', k.get\('registrationNumber'\), 'employees:', k.get\('totalEmployees'\), 'practiceAreas:', k.get\('practiceAreas'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); arr=\(d.get\('data'\) or d.get\('firms'\) or []\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else []; print\('count', len\(arr\)\); print\('first id', arr[0].get\('id'\) if arr else 'NONE'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); f=d.get\('data'\) or d; print\('firmName', f.get\('firmName'\)\); print\('firmType', f.get\('firmType'\)\); print\('city', f.get\('city'\)\); print\('about', \(f.get\('about'\) or ''\)[:80]\)")
